testcase.name: getClaimHistory_NonExistentClaim_Returns404

testcase.name: getClaimHistory_AfterReview_HasTwoEntries
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-10T15:05:58.678Z INFO 43401 --- [insurance-claim-system] [ main] c.i.claim.service.ClaimServiceImpl : Submitting claim for policy: POL-10002, type: MEDICAL 2026-03-10T15:05:58.688Z DEBUG 43401 --- [insurance-claim-system] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : select p1_0.policy_id, p1_0.coverage_limit, c1_0.policy_id, c1_0.coverage_id, c1_0.claim_type, c1_0.is_active, c1_0.limit_amount, p1_0.customer_id, p1_0.effective_date, p1_0.expiry_date, p1_0.policy_number, p1_0.status from policies p1_0 left join policy_coverages c1_0 on p1_0.policy_id=c1_0.policy_id where p1_0.policy_number=?
